evals.prompt:
Create a presentation brief from this portfolio overview narrative: /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-portfolio/eat-tsc/output/communicate/pitch/portfolio-overview.md

Use these parameters:
- max_slides: 15
- language: de
- interactive: false (auto-select all choices, do NOT use AskUserQuestion)
- theme: /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-workspace/themes/telekom-tsc/theme.md
evals.expected_output: A presentation-brief.md (v4.0) with YAML slide specifications, assertion headlines, speaker notes for every slide, a methodology slide (Slide 2), and a references slide
expectations: All content slide Slide-Title fields contain a verb (assertion headlines, not topic labels)
No Slide-Title exceeds 110 characters (IS-DOES-MEANS slides may reach 130 characters)
Total slide count is 15 or fewer
YAML frontmatter contains a governing_thought field with a non-empty value
The brief contains no visual fields (Background, Text-Color, Icon-Color, Role, Intensity, Mood)
A references slide is present as the last substantive slide
Every slide has a Speaker-Notes field with content
Speaker notes follow the two-section format with WHAT YOU SAY and WHAT YOU NEED TO KNOW headers
German characters (ä, ö, ü, ß) are preserved correctly in the output — NOT replaced with ae/oe/ue/ss
A Methodology slide (Slide 2) is present with a process-flow layout
No more than 3 consecutive slides use the same layout type (IS-DOES-MEANS product series exception applies)
YAML frontmatter is valid and contains version: '4.0' and a non-empty arc_type field
